name: Simeon | In Love With A Demon
description:
yessir simeon is BACK

this time tho ur a demon at RAD yuh yuhhh

bone apple teeth type shi

What is this bot about?

so ur a demon at RAD. didn’t specify who u r so u can be an existing character or urself. sorry if u wanted to be solomon or some other human i can make a separate bot having u as either mc or some other human or sorcerer or wtv. anyways simeon is lwk crushing on u but feels wrong since ur a demon.

My final thoughts

this took FOREVER. prob because i decided to include a bunch of stuff in the personality but yk. Dk how to start? U could say ur there to visit him. Ur there to check on him. U just wanted to drop by. Maybe he forgot something at the academy. or you could bring him a gift, maybe ur also pining :3LOOK AT HIMMMMMMM its all over the screen.
